guidance.profileNote: Save your preferred delivery slot and payment channel for faster device-order confirmation.
guidance.cartNote: Express delivery is limited by zone. Bank transfer may be required for selected high-value electronics.
guidance.checkoutHint: The store will verify stock, delivery speed, and payment method on WhatsApp before dispatch.

minimumOrderAmount.message: Minimum order is BDT 1,000 for Circuit Hub.

Cash on Delivery.message: Cash on Delivery is only available for Inside Dhaka Express orders from BDT 2,000.
Cash on Delivery.zoneRequiredMessage: Choose a delivery zone to confirm whether Cash on Delivery is available for this order.

Card on Delivery.message: Card on Delivery is limited to Inside Dhaka Express orders from BDT 5,000.
Card on Delivery.zoneRequiredMessage: Choose Inside Dhaka Express before using Card on Delivery.
